attributes.description: Historical top-N query analysis. What has been most expensive? Where is CPU time going?

query.esql:
FROM logs-oracledbreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE event_name == "db.server.top_query"
| STATS cpu_time = SUM(oracledb.cpu_time), elapsed_time = SUM(oracledb.elapsed_time), executions = SUM(oracledb.executions), buffer_gets = SUM(oracledb.buffer_gets), disk_reads = SUM(oracledb.disk_reads) BY sql_id = oracledb.sql_id, query_text = db.query.text
| SORT cpu_time DESC
| LIMIT 20

FROM logs-oracledbreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE event_name == "db.server.top_query"
| STATS cpu_time = SUM(oracledb.cpu_time), elapsed_time = SUM(oracledb.elapsed_time), executions = SUM(oracledb.executions), buffer_gets = SUM(oracledb.buffer_gets), disk_reads = SUM(oracledb.disk_reads) BY sql_id = oracledb.sql_id, query_text = db.query.text
| SORT cpu_time DESC
| LIMIT 20

embeddableConfig.description: Top 20 queries ranked by total CPU time, showing SQL ID, SQL text, CPU time, elapsed time, execution count, buffer gets, and disk reads.

query.esql:
FROM logs-oracledbreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE event_name == "db.server.top_query"
| STATS elapsed_time = SUM(oracledb.elapsed_time), cpu_time = SUM(oracledb.cpu_time), executions = SUM(oracledb.executions) BY sql_id = oracledb.sql_id, query_text = db.query.text
| SORT elapsed_time DESC
| LIMIT 15

FROM logs-oracledbreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE event_name == "db.server.top_query"
| STATS elapsed_time = SUM(oracledb.elapsed_time), cpu_time = SUM(oracledb.cpu_time), executions = SUM(oracledb.executions) BY sql_id = oracledb.sql_id, query_text = db.query.text
| SORT elapsed_time DESC
| LIMIT 15

embeddableConfig.description: Top 15 queries ranked by total elapsed time, showing SQL ID, SQL text, elapsed time, CPU time, and execution count.

query.esql:
FROM logs-oracledbreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE event_name == "db.server.top_query"
| STATS cpu_time = SUM(oracledb.cpu_time), user_io_wait = SUM(oracledb.user_io_wait_time), concurrency_wait = SUM(oracledb.concurrency_wait_time), application_wait = SUM(oracledb.application_wait_time), cluster_wait = SUM(oracledb.cluster_wait_time) BY sql_id = oracledb.sql_id
| SORT cpu_time DESC
| LIMIT 10

FROM logs-oracledbreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE event_name == "db.server.top_query"
| STATS cpu_time = SUM(oracledb.cpu_time), user_io_wait = SUM(oracledb.user_io_wait_time), concurrency_wait = SUM(oracledb.concurrency_wait_time), application_wait = SUM(oracledb.application_wait_time), cluster_wait = SUM(oracledb.cluster_wait_time) BY sql_id = oracledb.sql_id
| SORT cpu_time DESC
| LIMIT 10

attributes.title: Wait Time Breakdown for Top Queries

embeddableConfig.description: Per-query breakdown of elapsed time into CPU, User I/O Wait, Concurrency Wait, Application Wait, and Cluster Wait components. Top 10 queries by CPU time.

query.esql:
FROM logs-oracledbreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE event_name == "db.server.top_query"
| STATS buffer_gets = SUM(oracledb.buffer_gets), disk_reads = SUM(oracledb.disk_reads) BY sql_id = oracledb.sql_id
| SORT buffer_gets DESC
| LIMIT 10

FROM logs-oracledbreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE event_name == "db.server.top_query"
| STATS buffer_gets = SUM(oracledb.buffer_gets), disk_reads = SUM(oracledb.disk_reads) BY sql_id = oracledb.sql_id
| SORT buffer_gets DESC
| LIMIT 10

embeddableConfig.description: Comparison of logical reads (buffer gets) versus physical reads (disk reads) per query. Top 10 queries by buffer gets.

query.esql:
FROM logs-oracledbreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE event_name == "db.server.top_query" AND oracledb.cpu_time IS NOT NULL
| STATS total_cpu = SUM(oracledb.cpu_time) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT time_bucket ASC

FROM logs-oracledbreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE event_name == "db.server.top_query" AND oracledb.cpu_time IS NOT NULL
| STATS total_cpu = SUM(oracledb.cpu_time) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT time_bucket ASC

embeddableConfig.description: Aggregate CPU time consumed by top queries per time bucket. Shows the trend of query CPU cost over time.

query.esql:
FROM logs-oracledbreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE event_name == "db.server.top_query"
| STATS physical_read_bytes = SUM(oracledb.physical_read_bytes), physical_write_bytes = SUM(oracledb.physical_write_bytes), physical_read_reqs = SUM(oracledb.physical_read_requests), physical_write_reqs = SUM(oracledb.physical_write_requests) BY sql_id = oracledb.sql_id, query_text = db.query.text
| EVAL total_io_bytes = physical_read_bytes + physical_write_bytes
| SORT total_io_bytes DESC
| LIMIT 15

FROM logs-oracledbreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE event_name == "db.server.top_query"
| STATS physical_read_bytes = SUM(oracledb.physical_read_bytes), physical_write_bytes = SUM(oracledb.physical_write_bytes), physical_read_reqs = SUM(oracledb.physical_read_requests), physical_write_reqs = SUM(oracledb.physical_write_requests) BY sql_id = oracledb.sql_id, query_text = db.query.text
| EVAL total_io_bytes = physical_read_bytes + physical_write_bytes
| SORT total_io_bytes DESC
| LIMIT 15

embeddableConfig.description: Top 15 queries ranked by total I/O bytes, showing SQL ID, SQL text, physical read bytes, physical write bytes, and I/O request counts.

query.esql:
FROM logs-oracledbreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE event_name == "db.server.top_query" AND oracledb.executions IS NOT NULL AND oracledb.executions > 0
| STATS rows_processed = SUM(oracledb.rows_processed), executions = SUM(oracledb.executions) BY sql_id = oracledb.sql_id, query_text = db.query.text
| EVAL rows_per_exec = ROUND(rows_processed / executions, 1)
| SORT rows_per_exec DESC
| LIMIT 15

FROM logs-oracledbreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE event_name == "db.server.top_query" AND oracledb.executions IS NOT NULL AND oracledb.executions > 0
| STATS rows_processed = SUM(oracledb.rows_processed), executions = SUM(oracledb.executions) BY sql_id = oracledb.sql_id, query_text = db.query.text
| EVAL rows_per_exec = ROUND(rows_processed / executions, 1)
| SORT rows_per_exec DESC
| LIMIT 15

embeddableConfig.description: Top 15 queries ranked by rows processed per execution, showing SQL ID, SQL text, total rows processed, execution count, and the derived ratio.

query.esql:
FROM logs-oracledbreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE event_name == "db.server.top_query" AND oracledb.elapsed_time IS NOT NULL AND oracledb.elapsed_time > 0
| STATS concurrency_wait = SUM(oracledb.concurrency_wait_time), elapsed = SUM(oracledb.elapsed_time) BY sql_id = oracledb.sql_id, query_text = db.query.text
| EVAL concurrency_pct = ROUND(concurrency_wait / elapsed, 3)
| SORT concurrency_pct DESC
| LIMIT 15

FROM logs-oracledbreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE event_name == "db.server.top_query" AND oracledb.elapsed_time IS NOT NULL AND oracledb.elapsed_time > 0
| STATS concurrency_wait = SUM(oracledb.concurrency_wait_time), elapsed = SUM(oracledb.elapsed_time) BY sql_id = oracledb.sql_id, query_text = db.query.text
| EVAL concurrency_pct = ROUND(concurrency_wait / elapsed, 3)
| SORT concurrency_pct DESC
| LIMIT 15

embeddableConfig.description: Top 15 queries ranked by concurrency wait percentage of elapsed time. Shows SQL ID, SQL text, concurrency wait time, elapsed time, and the derived ratio.

embeddableConfig.content:
# Oracle Database - Query Performance & Plans

This dashboard offers an AWR-equivalent historical view of SQL workload, including

- Distinct SQL ID count, peak single-query CPU time, and total accumulated CPU across all queries
- Top queries ranked by CPU time and elapsed time with execution count, buffer gets, and disk reads
- Wait time breakdown per query showing CPU, User I/O, Concurrency, Application, and Cluster wait components
- Buffer gets versus disk reads comparison to identify queries bypassing the cache
- Total CPU time trend over time to spot workload shifts
- I/O intensive queries ranked by total physical read and write bytes with request counts
- Top queries by execution frequency and rows processed per execution for efficiency analysis
- Queries with the highest concurrency wait percentage to pinpoint locking and contention hotspots

query.esql:
FROM logs-oracledbreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE event_name == "db.server.top_query" AND oracledb.cpu_time IS NOT NULL
| STATS max_cpu = MAX(oracledb.cpu_time)

FROM logs-oracledbreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE event_name == "db.server.top_query" AND oracledb.cpu_time IS NOT NULL
| STATS max_cpu = MAX(oracledb.cpu_time)

embeddableConfig.description: Highest CPU time in seconds (MAX of oracledb.cpu_time) consumed by a single query in the selected time range.

query.esql:
FROM logs-oracledbreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE event_name == "db.server.top_query" AND oracledb.cpu_time IS NOT NULL
| STATS max_cpu = MAX(oracledb.cpu_time)

FROM logs-oracledbreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE event_name == "db.server.top_query" AND oracledb.cpu_time IS NOT NULL
| STATS total_cpu = SUM(oracledb.cpu_time)

FROM logs-oracledbreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE event_name == "db.server.top_query" AND oracledb.cpu_time IS NOT NULL
| STATS total_cpu = SUM(oracledb.cpu_time)

embeddableConfig.description: Sum of CPU time in seconds (SUM of oracledb.cpu_time) consumed across all top queries in the selected time range.

query.esql:
FROM logs-oracledbreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE event_name == "db.server.top_query" AND oracledb.cpu_time IS NOT NULL
| STATS total_cpu = SUM(oracledb.cpu_time)

FROM logs-oracledbreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE event_name == "db.server.top_query" AND oracledb.sql_id IS NOT NULL
| STATS distinct_sql = COUNT_DISTINCT(oracledb.sql_id)

FROM logs-oracledbreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE event_name == "db.server.top_query" AND oracledb.sql_id IS NOT NULL
| STATS distinct_sql = COUNT_DISTINCT(oracledb.sql_id)

embeddableConfig.description: Number of unique SQL IDs (oracledb.sql_id) observed in db.server.top_query events during the selected time range.

query.esql:
FROM logs-oracledbreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE event_name == "db.server.top_query" AND oracledb.sql_id IS NOT NULL
| STATS distinct_sql = COUNT_DISTINCT(oracledb.sql_id)

FROM logs-oracledbreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE event_name == "db.server.top_query" AND oracledb.executions IS NOT NULL
| STATS exec_count = SUM(oracledb.executions) BY sql_id = oracledb.sql_id
| SORT exec_count DESC
| LIMIT 10

FROM logs-oracledbreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE event_name == "db.server.top_query" AND oracledb.executions IS NOT NULL
| STATS exec_count = SUM(oracledb.executions) BY sql_id = oracledb.sql_id
| SORT exec_count DESC
| LIMIT 10

embeddableConfig.description: Top 10 queries ranked by total execution count (oracledb.executions). Shows the most frequently executed SQL statements.

attributes.title: [Logs Oracle] Query Performance & Plans
